creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192539
Patch adding a new devel/shell-toolbox port (version: 20180415)

shell-toolbox is a collection of shell scripts development tools.

Currently, the only included script is "shell", which is useful for testing
things in an interactive environment other than your usual shell, or for
testing things in a clean environment with automatic cleanup of any files left
behind.

QA:
 - poudriere: 11.1 amd64
 - portlint -AC
 - manual testing: 12.0-CURRENT r332397
